name: lecstor-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins — shared subagent configurations and workflow tooling.

plugins.name: development
plugins.description: Personal collection of Claude Code skills — domain-specific coding guidance loaded on demand.

plugins.name: context-management
plugins.description: Subagent set for context isolation — scout, coder, docs-lookup, test-runner, review, browser. Includes delegation rules to keep large tool outputs out of the main agent's context window.

plugins.name: automation
plugins.description: Unattended task execution — the work-phase coordinator drives a project's task list, dispatching task-worker subagents to complete, verify, and commit each task in a loop.

plugins.name: tools
plugins.description: Skills for driving external developer tools and services from Claude Code — Sentry CLI, Cloudflare Workers secrets.
